2290990.name: Trials of the Spirit
2290990.description:
Trials of the Spirit is an Action Adventure rogue-like where you choose to play as an elemental guardian. You are thrust into action after a ritual gone wrong causes a corrupted spirit to wreak havoc in the Human world. You are tasked with capturing the spirit and reversing the corruption it has left in its wake. Collect different sets of abilities hidden in special ability crystals throughout the world to empower yourself. Take advantage of elemental type matchups to save the day!

WASD for movement
LMB for offensive abilities
